name: Ashford Athletics Track (Julie Rose Stadium)
metaTitle: Julie Rose Stadium Athletics Track | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the Julie Rose Stadium in Ashford, Kent.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 07:00–20:30, Sat 08:00–16:00, Sun 08:00–14:00. Check the Freedom Leisure schedule for event closures.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pay-as-you-go sessions are available. Contact the stadium for current track use pricing and membership options.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A high-quality 400m synthetic track with a 1,000-seat grandstand and complete field event facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking is available for visitors, including electric vehicle charging points.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Freedom Leisure page for the Julie Rose Stadium for opening updates.
